docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAKUMANI, AKASH HOSSAIN, FARZANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P. $7,764.51 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,854.51, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT LEASE AGREEMENT IS TERMINATED AS OF 1/1/26. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,648.57 FILED BY KAKUMANI, AKASH HOSSAIN, FARZANA AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAKUMANI, AKASH HOSSAIN, FARZANA AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) LIZA MORATTO, ASST. GENERAL MANAGER & MARTIN LABRADO, MAINTENCE OPERATIONS MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF AKASH KAKUMANI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF FARZANA HOSSAIN IS PRESENT DEFENDANT BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, LP IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON APR-02-26. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, L.P. VIA COURT CERTIFIED MAIL. (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPED NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
